description: Use this API to change the name of the specified two-terminal dc line. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = mbid2dc(dc, dcnew)

parameters.name: dc
parameters.description: Quoted name of the two-terminal dc line for which the dc line name is to be changed; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left- justified name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: dcnew
parameters.description: Quoted new name to be assigned to the two-terminal dc line; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left-justified name. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: a non-blank new identifier must be specified.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
